title: Glide 1.6.5 — Tutor mode + smarter auto-start
body:
What's new:

• Tutor mode for new drivers — turn it on in Settings for a distraction-free drive (no on-screen prompts). Afterwards the trip is shown as a shareable report card with a letter grade and plain-language notes you can send to a parent.

• Smarter auto-start — Glide no longer restarts a recording right after you stop one by hand, and it can now pick up a brand-new drive straight from the trip summary screen.

• More reliable GPS when a trip begins, plus general stability fixes.
